sections.title: Using a rune defender on Lorelai before unlocking the room

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Rune Defender here, please let me in!

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Very well, I've unlocked the door but you'll still need 100 tokens from upstairs before you can enter as well as 10 for every minute you want to stay inside. Have fun in there!

sections.title: Attempting to open the basement door to the Cyclopes room before first talking to Lorelai, but with the player having a rune defender in inventory

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: I see you have a worthy defender! I'll release some cyclops to help you get an upgrade. They are quite mean and strong though...

sections.title: Using a rune defender on Lorelai after already unlocking the room

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: You've already proved yourself to me, the door is unlocked.

sections.title: Using a dragon defender on Lorelai

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Congratulations you've found a Dragon defender! You're welcome to go back inside and try to get more.

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Hello! I'm Lorelai. Welcome to the Warriors' Guild basement!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: I'm training this group of special Cyclopes to be stronger and more powerful for Kamfreena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's special about these Cyclopes?

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: They have a chance of dropping a new, more powerful defender. Kamfreena doesn't want just anyone getting their hands on one so she moved them down here and tasked me with training them.

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: With a punishing routine of combat, fighting and the odd death!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, you just let them fight each other and hope they get stronger?

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Of course not, that would just be cruel! Kamfreena and I only allow the most worthy of adventurers to fight these cyclopes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am a mighty adventurer! Can I fight them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am a mighty adventurer! Can I fight them?

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: You'll need to display your skills as a Warrior before I can allow you to enter the room.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I do that?

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Bring me a Rune Defender and I shall unlock the door for you, this shows me you have dedicated enough time to fighting the Cyclops upstairs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Rune Defender here, please let me in!

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: And the Wise Old Man is my Dad... come back when you have the Rune Defender!

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Very well, I've unlocked the door but you'll still need 100 tokens from upstairs before you can enter as well as 10 for every minute you want to stay inside. Have fun in there!

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Yes, you have already proved yourself to me, the door is unlocked.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: See you around.

sections.title: After running out of tokens in the room
If the player does not leave the room after 100 ticks

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Next time, please leave as soon as your time is up.

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Your time is up, please make your way to the exit.

sections.title: Attempting to take off the Attack cape or max cape while in the room

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: You must keep your attack skillcape or max cape equipped to stay in the area.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: You don't have space to carry them.

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Of course! Here you go, you've earned [number] token[s]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go see what I can find.

lines.speaker: Lorelai
lines.text: Ahh I see you've met Rory. As a young Cyclops he's not ready for combat yet so he keeps me company.
